title: polkit bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[125-4.0.1]
- Increase timeout to avoid defunct processes [Orabug: 26930744]

[125-4]
- changing log level via dbus is now restricted to root
- backport of https://github.com/polkit-org/polkit/commit/5a4ba7dfdcc3f
- Resolves: RHEL-90807
full_text:
[125-4.0.1]
- Increase timeout to avoid defunct processes [Orabug: 26930744]

[125-4]
- changing log level via dbus is now restricted to root
- backport of https://github.com/polkit-org/polkit/commit/5a4ba7dfdcc3f
- Resolves: RHEL-90807

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20222-0.html
